items.title: Piers Morgan trolls Gary Lineker with ‘rest is boring’ jibe as he teams up with John Terry for rival World Cup podcast
items.summary: PIERS MORGAN took a pop at Gary Neville's World Cup podcast while launching his own rival show. Morgan will be joined by Chelsea icon John Terry and talkSPORT stalwart Simon Jordan when "World Cup Uncensored" begins on June 8. One of their main competitors in the World Cup podcast market will be the

items.title: Shakira to perform at World Cup opening ceremony
items.summary: Colombian pop star Shakira will perform her official song for the 2026 World Cup at the competition's opening ceremony in Mexico.

items.title: Glamorgan claim dramatic win over Somerset in Vitality Blast
Spieth sinks UNBELIEVABLE 63ft putt facing completely the wrong way!
items.summary: Jordan Spieth holed a 63-foot putt, facing completely the wrong way on the sixth hole of the Memorial Tournament in Dublin, Ohio.

items.title: NI's record side show grit beyond their years
items.summary: Northern Ireland, fielding a record youthful side, showed resilience beyond their years in a 1-0 friendly win over Guinea in Spain.

items.title: Las Vegas to host F1 until 2037 after contract extension agreed
Switzerland's Embolo granted approval to travel to US
items.summary: Switzerland forward Breel Embolo has his Esta authorisation approved and can travel to the United States to join up with the rest of his team-mates as they prepare for the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Doski stunner earns Iraq draw against understrength Spain in World Cup warm-up
items.summary: Spain will depart from Santiago de Compostela at 10am on Friday morning bound for Chattanooga, via Nashville, but seven of the eight men who made their debuts in the final preparation game before the World Cup will not be on board with them.
